# Devlog: v1.2.0 — three floors, thirty-card pools, and The IRS

Paste into a new devlog on https://dorfid.itch.io/performative-wizards
(devlogs ping followers AND get a fresh-content bump in itch's feeds —
publish the same day the build goes up).

---

**Title:** The IRS update — every act is a floor now, and one of the enemies steals your gold and RUNS

**Body:**

The demo just got its biggest update. Headlines:

**Every act is a floor with its own cast.** Act 1 is *the Block* — your own
hexed neighborhood (the toaster never forgave you). Act 2 is *the Scene*:
the venue turns on you — cursed mirrors, a strobing disco ball, and a new
boss, **The Bouncer**, who checks your fit at the door (Exposed), charges a
cover (Aura tax), and pat-downs in multi-hits. Act 3 is *the Feed*:
NPC Streamers who literally loop, Reply Guys who chip through Block, and an
Engagement Farmer that drains your Aura economy dry.

**The IRS is real and it is hostile.** It audits you, garnishes **25% of
your gold**, and files to LEAVE with it. Kill it before it dips and your
refund comes through. Choose your priorities.

**A second finale.** The Feed now ends on The Algorithm *or* **The Talent
Agent** — an industry ghoul who books weaker versions of the other bosses
against you (the Critic's Intern has a clipboard and no mercy). His clients
only take ONE booking each, so clear the stage and corner him.

**30 cards per wizard, 30 relics.** Twelve new cards dig into each class's
identity — the Rizzard can now get **Ghosted** (dodge hits equal to your
Rizz), Vesper writes a **Burn Book** (every opp takes 2× its OWN Roast), and
mini-finishers let you spend SOME Aura without cashing out the show. Fourteen
new relics ladder from Common to Legendary by bending rules, not inflating
numbers: never get Booed, finishers refund a cut, your hand never discards,
the Critic becomes literally Parasocial about you.

**The dressing room got a rack.** The wardrobe UI now scales to any amount
of drip — per-slot rack sections + a pinned "fit" rail. Item sprites got real
silhouettes too: veils, heels, selfie sticks, a flash cannon.

All of it free, in the browser, 30–45 min runs, EN/DE/ES. If you played an
older build: your unlocks carried over. The Critic is waiting. She has
*opinions* about your hiatus.
